required_preferences.fact: Shares in-person evening downtime and routines with her partner after work hours — replaces nightly scheduled video calls with collaborative activities at home

supersedes.fact: Schedules video calls with her long-distance partner for 9pm sharp each night — never reschedules for work or social conflicts

required_preferences.fact: Switches to brief coding sessions with frequent hand rest breaks and voice dictation for notes — avoids prolonged typing due to wrist injury

supersedes.fact: Works long, continuous coding sessions during set business hours — no longer takes extended flexible screen breaks throughout the day

required_preferences.fact: Meticulously checks packaged food labels for allergen warnings before purchase and avoids bulk bin items to prevent cross-contamination
Attends women in tech meetups in person whenever possible — never joins virtually unless traveling
Experiments with indie mobile games weekly, but avoids blockbuster titles
Plays casual board games at home with friends during weekends instead of physical activities, as an alternative social hobby during injury recovery

persona: A 24-year-old mobile app developer freelancing full-time
